title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXXIII. Jingles.
content:
To market, to market, to buy a fat pig,
            Home again, home again, dancing a jig;
        Ride to the market to buy a fat hog,
            Home again, home again, jiggety-jog.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXXIII. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
